# Buteforce

> Buteforce is an AI automation and computer vision company. We build production-grade AI systems for businesses that are done doing things manually — real systems, shipped fast, with measurable results. We do not do consulting, strategy decks, or pilot projects.

## Core Services

- [AI Workflow Automation](https://buteforce.com/services#ai-automation): End-to-end workflow automation using n8n, Python, and Claude API. We eliminate manual processes across operations, marketing, and back-office functions.
- [Computer Vision Systems](https://buteforce.com/services#computer-vision): Custom-trained YOLOv8 and PyTorch models for quality control, object detection, and visual inspection at production scale.
- [AI Agents](https://buteforce.com/services#ai-agents): Autonomous multi-agent systems with human-in-the-loop oversight, built on Google ADK and Claude API for complex decision-making tasks.
- [Document AI & OCR](https://buteforce.com/services#document-ai): Sub-second document extraction pipelines using Mistral 7B, PaddleOCR, and Google Cloud Vision for invoices, contracts, and forms.

## Proven Production Results

- 99.2% classification accuracy at 120 items/min (orthopedic product manufacturing QC)
- Sub-second document processing latency across all document types
- 80% reduction in content operations time via AI marketing agent
- 70% of real estate inquiries handled autonomously by AI agent
- 75% reduction in email management time via intelligent email agent

## Technology Stack

Claude API, YOLOv8, PyTorch, n8n, Google ADK, Mistral 7B, PaddleOCR, OpenCV, Next.js, Supabase, Trigger.dev, PostgreSQL, Python, Vercel

## Case Studies

- [OCR Extraction System](https://buteforce.com/work/ocr-extraction): Live production document AI system at ocr-extraction.com
- [Orthopedic Product Classifier](https://buteforce.com/work/ortho-classifier): 99.2% accuracy computer vision QC at 120 items/min
- [Real Estate AI Agent](https://buteforce.com/work/real-estate-agent): Handles 70% of inquiries autonomously
- [Football Analytics System](https://buteforce.com/work/football-analytics): Computer vision player and ball tracking
- [AI Marketing Agent](https://buteforce.com/work/marketing-agent): 80% reduction in content operations time
- [Invoice Generator](https://buteforce.com/work/invoice-generator): Automated document generation pipeline
- [Personal AI Assistant](https://buteforce.com/work/personal-assistant): Multi-modal personal productivity agent
- [Email Management Agent](https://buteforce.com/work/email-agent): 75% reduction in email handling time
- [Blog Writing Agent](https://buteforce.com/work/blog-agent): Autonomous SEO content generation system
- [CineCraft](https://buteforce.com/work/cinecraft): AI-powered creative production tool
